title: Safe Puppy Trap
intendedTensionBeat: The upper puppy is easier to reach, but the lower puppy is the correct first rescue because water is advancing.
intendedReleaseBeat: Choosing the endangered lower puppy first makes the later easy rescue feel like a controlled payoff.
expectedPath: Ignore the tempting easy upper route, open the lower route first, rescue the endangered puppy, then finish the upper puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player takes the easy rescue first and discovers that water made the lower route too expensive afterward.
designNotes: This is the first explicit wrong-order lesson of the band. The mistake should be visible, not cruel.
